Module 7 - Straight Line Looping Online
This module explores the SLM looping strategy for inoculating against objections and closing
the sale!
Remember, there are only 3 reasons why you prospect hasn’t yet committed to the sale:
1. They don’t yet love our product
2. They don’t yet trust and connect with you.
3. They don’t yet trust and connect with your company
We’re going to use online marketing tools, along with Jordan’s proprietary SLM strategy, to
navigate around objections and follow the prospect around the internet until we’ve presented a
strong case for each of these possibilities. Remember, if we can hit our 3 x 10’s, we can close
just about anybody who is closable.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com
